mapper.sql:
select id, day_str, usdt_balance, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, recharge_amount, recharge_num, withdraw_amount, withdraw_num, real_amount, fee, user_num, first_num, first_amount, user_amount, second_num, second_amount, three_remain_num, three_remain, seven_remain_num, seven_remain, bet_amount, bet_num, settle_amount, win_lose_amount, efficient_bet_amount, wait_rebate_amount, already_rebate_amount, wait_return_commission_amount, already_return_commission_amount, unclaimed_agent_salary_amount, claimed_agent_salary_amount, play_wheel_term_award, play_wheel_term_num, create_time, update_time, bonus_amount, customer_recharge_amount, customer_bonus_amount, transfer_bonus_amount, customer_recharge_num, customer_real_cash_withdrawal_amount, customer_real_cash_withdrawal_num, customer_real_cash_withdrawal_real_amount, customer_points_deducted_amount, customer_points_deducted_num, activity_award_bonus_amount, receive_bonus_num, activity_award_total_num, receive_turntable_num, user_earnings, user_expenses, customer_loss_amount, calculations_time, recharge_people_num, withdrawal_people_num, active_people_num, mpay_recharge_amount, mpay_recharge_num, blockchain_recharge_amount, blockchain_recharge_num, pixpay_recharge_amount, pixpay_recharge_num, law_withdraw_amount, law_withdraw_num, code_amount, restore_amount, restore_num, pix_bonus_amount, unsettled_bets_amount, unsettled_bets_num, ynd_bonus_amount, yndpay_recharge_amount, yndpay_recharge_num, upay_bonus_amount, upay_recharge_amount, upay_recharge_num, pay1818_recharge_amount, pay1818_recharge_num, pay1818_bonus_amount, rupee_recharge_amount, rupee_recharge_num, rupee_bonus_amount, zloty_recharge_amount, zloty_recharge_num, zloty_bonus_amount, hwpay_recharge_amount, hwpay_recharge_num, hwpay_bonus_amount, u_recharge_amount, u_recharge_num, u_bonus_amount, new_person_num, new_person_amount, private_person_num, private_person_amount, group_num, group_amount, super_num, super_amount, red_private_num, red_private_amount, red_num, red_amount, vip_reward_num,vip_reward_amount, total_packet_amount
from t_count_order
mapper.insert:
insert into t_count_order
day_str, usdt_balance, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, recharge_amount, recharge_num, withdraw_amount, withdraw_num, real_amount, fee, user_num, first_num, first_amount, user_amount, second_num, second_amount, three_remain_num, three_remain, seven_remain_num, seven_remain, bet_amount, bet_num, settle_amount, win_lose_amount, efficient_bet_amount, wait_rebate_amount, already_rebate_amount, wait_return_commission_amount, already_return_commission_amount, unclaimed_agent_salary_amount, claimed_agent_salary_amount, play_wheel_term_award, play_wheel_term_num, create_time, update_time, bonus_amount, customer_recharge_amount, customer_bonus_amount, transfer_bonus_amount, customer_recharge_num, customer_real_cash_withdrawal_amount, customer_real_cash_withdrawal_num, customer_real_cash_withdrawal_real_amount, customer_points_deducted_amount, customer_points_deducted_num, activity_award_bonus_amount, receive_bonus_num, activity_award_total_num, receive_turntable_num, user_earnings, user_expenses, customer_loss_amount, calculations_time,
restore_amount, restore_num,
#{dayStr}, #{usdtBalance}, #{currencyId}, #{itemId}, #{chainTag}, #{rechargeAmount}, #{rechargeNum}, #{withdrawAmount}, #{withdrawNum}, #{realAmount}, #{fee}, #{userNum}, #{firstNum}, #{firstAmount}, #{userAmount}, #{secondNum}, #{secondAmount}, #{threeRemainNum}, #{threeRemain}, #{sevenRemainNum}, #{sevenRemain}, #{betAmount}, #{betNum}, #{settleAmount}, #{winLoseAmount}, #{efficientBetAmount}, #{waitRebateAmount}, #{alreadyRebateAmount}, #{waitReturnCommissionAmount}, #{alreadyReturnCommissionAmount}, #{unclaimedAgentSalaryAmount}, #{claimedAgentSalaryAmount}, #{playWheelTermAward}, #{playWheelTermNum}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{bonusAmount}, #{customerRechargeAmount}, #{customerBonusAmount}, #{transferBonusAmount}, #{customerRechargeNum}, #{customerRealCashWithdrawalAmount}, #{customerRealCashWithdrawalNum}, #{customerRealCashWithdrawalRealAmount}, #{customerPointsDeductedAmount}, #{customerPointsDeductedNum}, #{activityAwardBonusAmount}, #{receiveBonusNum}, #{activityAwardTotalNum}, #{receiveTurntableNum}, #{userEarnings}, #{userExpenses}, #{customerLossAmount}, #{calculationsTime},
#{restoreAmount}, #{restoreNum},
mapper.update:
update t_count_order
day_str = #{dayStr}, usdt_balance = #{usdtBalance}, currency_id = #{currencyId}, item_id = #{itemId}, chain_tag = #{chainTag}, recharge_amount = #{rechargeAmount}, recharge_num = #{rechargeNum}, withdraw_amount = #{withdrawAmount}, withdraw_num = #{withdrawNum}, real_amount = #{realAmount}, fee = #{fee}, user_num = #{userNum}, first_num = #{firstNum}, first_amount = #{firstAmount}, user_amount = #{userAmount}, second_num = #{secondNum}, second_amount = #{secondAmount}, three_remain_num = #{threeRemainNum}, three_remain = #{threeRemain}, seven_remain_num = #{sevenRemainNum}, seven_remain = #{sevenRemain}, bet_amount = #{betAmount}, bet_num = #{betNum}, settle_amount = #{settleAmount}, win_lose_amount = #{winLoseAmount}, efficient_bet_amount = #{efficientBetAmount}, wait_rebate_amount = #{waitRebateAmount}, already_rebate_amount = #{alreadyRebateAmount}, wait_return_commission_amount = #{waitReturnCommissionAmount},
already_return_commission_amount = #{alreadyReturnCommissionAmount},
unclaimed_agent_salary_amount = #{unclaimedAgentSalaryAmount},
claimed_agent_salary_amount = #{claimedAgentSalaryAmount},
play_wheel_term_award = #{playWheelTermAward}, play_wheel_term_num = #{playWheelTermNum}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, bonus_amount = #{bonusAmount}, customer_recharge_amount = #{customerRechargeAmount}, customer_bonus_amount = #{customerBonusAmount}, transfer_bonus_amount = #{transferBonusAmount},
customer_recharge_num = #{customerRechargeNum}, customer_real_cash_withdrawal_amount = #{customerRealCashWithdrawalAmount},
customer_real_cash_withdrawal_num = #{customerRealCashWithdrawalNum},
customer_real_cash_withdrawal_real_amount = #{customerRealCashWithdrawalRealAmount},
customer_points_deducted_amount = #{customerPointsDeductedAmount},
customer_points_deducted_num = #{customerPointsDeductedNum},
activity_award_bonus_amount = #{activityAwardBonusAmount}, receive_bonus_num = #{receiveBonusNum}, activity_award_total_num = #{activityAwardTotalNum}, receive_turntable_num = #{receiveTurntableNum}, user_earnings = #{userEarnings}, user_expenses = #{userExpenses}, customer_loss_amount = #{customerLossAmount}, calculations_time = #{calculationsTime},
restore_amount = #{restoreAmount}, restore_num = #{restoreNum},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_count_order where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(recharge_amount), 0.0000) as rechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(recharge_num), 0) as rechargeNum , ifnull(sum(fee), 0) as fee , ifnull(sum(withdraw_amount), 0.0000) as withdrawAmount from `t_count_order` where currency_id = #{currencyId}

select ifnull(sum(recharge_amount), 0.0000) as rechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(recharge_num), 0) as rechargeNum , ifnull(sum(first_num), 0) as firstNum , ifnull(sum(first_amount), 0) as firstAmount , ifnull(sum(user_amount), 0) as userAmount from `t_count_order` where day_str = #{day} and currency_id = #{currencyId}

select left(day_str, 7) as dayStr , ifnull(sum(recharge_amount), 0.0000) as rechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(recharge_num), 0) as rechargeNum , ifnull(sum(withdraw_amount), 0.0000) as withdrawAmount , ifnull(sum(withdraw_num), 0) as withdrawNum , ifnull(sum(fee), 0) as fee , ifnull(sum(user_num), 0) as userNum , ifnull(sum(first_num), 0) as firstNum , ifnull(sum(first_amount), 0.0000) as firstAmount , ifnull(sum(real_amount), 0.0000) as realAmount , ifnull(sum(second_num), 0) as secondNum , ifnull(sum(second_amount), 0.0000) as secondAmount , ifnull(sum(three_remain_num), 0) as threeRemainNum , ifnull(sum(three_remain), 0.0000) as threeRemain , ifnull(sum(seven_remain_num), 0) as sevenRemainNum , ifnull(sum(seven_remain), 0.0000) as sevenRemain , ifnull(sum(bet_amount), 0.0000) as betAmount , ifnull(sum(bet_num), 0) as betNum , ifnull(sum(settle_amount), 0.0000) as settleAmount , ifnull(sum(win_lose_amount), 0.0000) as winLoseAmount , ifnull(sum(efficient_bet_amount), 0.0000) as efficientBetAmount , ifnull(sum(wait_rebate_amount), 0.0000) as waitRebateAmount , ifnull(sum(already_rebate_amount), 0.0000) as alreadyRebateAmount , ifnull(sum(wait_return_commission_amount), 0.0000) as waitReturnCommissionAmount , ifnull(sum(already_return_commission_amount), 0.0000) as alreadyReturnCommissionAmount , ifnull(sum(unclaimed_agent_salary_amount), 0.0000) as unclaimedAgentSalaryAmount , ifnull(sum(claimed_agent_salary_amount), 0.0000) as claimedAgentSalaryAmount , ifnull(sum(play_wheel_term_award), 0.0000) as playWheelTermAward , ifnull(sum(play_wheel_term_num), 0) as playWheelTermNum , ifnull(sum(bonus_amount), 0) as bonusAmount , ifnull(sum(customer_recharge_amount), 0) as customerRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(customer_bonus_amount), 0) as customerBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(transfer_bonus_amount), 0) as transferBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(customer_recharge_num), 0) as customerRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(customer_real_cash_withdrawal_amount), 0) as customerRealCashWithdrawalAmount , ifnull(sum(customer_real_cash_withdrawal_num), 0) as customerRealCashWithdrawalNum , ifnull(sum(customer_real_cash_withdrawal_real_amount), 0) as customerRealCashWithdrawalRealAmount , ifnull(sum(customer_points_deducted_amount), 0) as customerPointsDeductedAmount , ifnull(sum(customer_points_deducted_num), 0) as customerPointsDeductedNum , ifnull(sum(activity_award_bonus_amount), 0) as activityAwardBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(receive_bonus_num), 0) as receiveBonusNum , ifnull(sum(activity_award_total_num), 0) as activityAwardTotalNum , ifnull(sum(receive_turntable_num), 0) as receiveTurntableNum , ifnull(sum(user_earnings), 0) as userEarnings , ifnull(sum(user_expenses), 0) as userExpenses , ifnull(sum(customer_loss_amount), 0) as customerLossAmount , ifnull(sum(recharge_people_num), 0) as rechargePeopleNum , ifnull(sum(withdrawal_people_num), 0) as withdrawalPeopleNum , ifnull(sum(active_people_num), 0) as activePeopleNum , ifnull(sum(mpay_recharge_amount), 0) as mpayRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(mpay_recharge_num), 0) as mpayRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(blockchain_recharge_amount), 0) as blockchainRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(blockchain_recharge_num), 0) as blockchainRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(pixpay_recharge_amount), 0) as pixpayRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(pixpay_recharge_num), 0) as pixpayRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(law_withdraw_amount), 0) as lawWithdrawAmount , ifnull(sum(law_withdraw_num), 0) as lawWithdrawNum , MAX(calculations_time) as calculationsTime , ifnull(sum(code_amount), 0) as codeAmount , ifnull(sum(pix_bonus_amount), 0) as pixBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(restore_amount), 0) as restoreAmount , ifnull(sum(restore_num), 0) as restoreNum , ifnull(sum(yndpay_recharge_amount), 0) as yndpayRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(yndpay_recharge_num), 0) as yndpayRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(ynd_bonus_amount), 0) as yndBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(upay_bonus_amount), 0) as upayBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(upay_recharge_amount), 0) as upayRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(upay_recharge_num), 0) as upayRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(pay1818_recharge_amount), 0) as pay1818RechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(pay1818_bonus_amount), 0) as pay1818BonusAmount , ifnull(sum(pay1818_recharge_num), 0) as pay1818RechargeNum , ifnull(sum(rupee_recharge_amount), 0) as rupeeRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(rupee_recharge_num), 0) as rupeeRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(rupee_bonus_amount), 0) as rupeeBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(zloty_recharge_amount), 0) as zlotyRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(zloty_recharge_num), 0) as zlotyRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(zloty_bonus_amount), 0) as zlotyBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(hwpay_recharge_amount), 0) as hwpayRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(hwpay_recharge_num), 0) as hwpayRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(hwpay_bonus_amount), 0) as hwpayBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(u_recharge_amount), 0) as uRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(u_recharge_num), 0) as uRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(u_bonus_amount), 0) as uBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(new_person_num), 0) as newPersonNum , ifnull(sum(new_person_amount), 0) as newPersonAmount , ifnull(sum(private_person_num), 0) as privatePersonNum , ifnull(sum(private_person_amount), 0) as privatePersonAmount , ifnull(sum(group_num), 0) as groupNum , ifnull(sum(group_amount), 0) as groupAmount , ifnull(sum(super_num), 0) as superNum , ifnull(sum(super_amount), 0) as superAmount , ifnull(sum(red_private_num), 0) as redPrivateNum , ifnull(sum(red_private_amount), 0) as redPrivateAmount , ifnull(sum(red_num), 0) as redNum , ifnull(sum(red_amount), 0) as redAmount , ifnull(sum(vip_reward_num), 0) as vipRewardNum , ifnull(sum(vip_reward_amount), 0) as vipRewardAmount , ifnull(sum(total_packet_amount), 0) as totalPacketAmount from t_count_order where day_str between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and currency_id = #{currencyId} group by left(day_str, 7);

select left(day_str, 7) as dayStr , ifnull(sum(recharge_amount), 0.0000) as rechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(recharge_num), 0) as rechargeNum , ifnull(sum(withdraw_amount), 0.0000) as withdrawAmount , ifnull(sum(withdraw_num), 0) as withdrawNum , ifnull(sum(fee), 0) as fee , ifnull(sum(user_num), 0) as userNum , ifnull(sum(first_num), 0) as firstNum , ifnull(sum(first_amount), 0.0000) as firstAmount , ifnull(sum(real_amount), 0.0000) as realAmount , ifnull(sum(second_num), 0) as secondNum , ifnull(sum(second_amount), 0.0000) as secondAmount , ifnull(sum(three_remain_num), 0) as threeRemainNum , ifnull(sum(three_remain), 0.0000) as threeRemain , ifnull(sum(seven_remain_num), 0) as sevenRemainNum , ifnull(sum(seven_remain), 0.0000) as sevenRemain , ifnull(sum(bet_amount), 0.0000) as betAmount , ifnull(sum(bet_num), 0) as betNum , ifnull(sum(settle_amount), 0.0000) as settleAmount , ifnull(sum(win_lose_amount), 0.0000) as winLoseAmount , ifnull(sum(efficient_bet_amount), 0.0000) as efficientBetAmount , ifnull(sum(wait_rebate_amount), 0.0000) as waitRebateAmount , ifnull(sum(already_rebate_amount), 0.0000) as alreadyRebateAmount , ifnull(sum(wait_return_commission_amount), 0.0000) as waitReturnCommissionAmount , ifnull(sum(already_return_commission_amount), 0.0000) as alreadyReturnCommissionAmount , ifnull(sum(unclaimed_agent_salary_amount), 0.0000) as unclaimedAgentSalaryAmount , ifnull(sum(claimed_agent_salary_amount), 0.0000) as claimedAgentSalaryAmount , ifnull(sum(play_wheel_term_award), 0.0000) as playWheelTermAward , ifnull(sum(play_wheel_term_num), 0) as playWheelTermNum , ifnull(sum(bonus_amount), 0) as bonusAmount , ifnull(sum(customer_recharge_amount), 0) as customerRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(customer_bonus_amount), 0) as customerBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(transfer_bonus_amount), 0) as transferBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(customer_recharge_num), 0) as customerRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(customer_real_cash_withdrawal_amount), 0) as customerRealCashWithdrawalAmount , ifnull(sum(customer_real_cash_withdrawal_num), 0) as customerRealCashWithdrawalNum , ifnull(sum(customer_real_cash_withdrawal_real_amount), 0) as customerRealCashWithdrawalRealAmount , ifnull(sum(customer_points_deducted_amount), 0) as customerPointsDeductedAmount , ifnull(sum(customer_points_deducted_num), 0) as customerPointsDeductedNum , ifnull(sum(activity_award_bonus_amount), 0) as activityAwardBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(receive_bonus_num), 0) as receiveBonusNum , ifnull(sum(activity_award_total_num), 0) as activityAwardTotalNum , ifnull(sum(receive_turntable_num), 0) as receiveTurntableNum , ifnull(sum(user_earnings), 0) as userEarnings , ifnull(sum(user_expenses), 0) as userExpenses , ifnull(sum(customer_loss_amount), 0) as customerLossAmount , ifnull(sum(recharge_people_num), 0) as rechargePeopleNum , ifnull(sum(withdrawal_people_num), 0) as withdrawalPeopleNum , ifnull(sum(active_people_num), 0) as activePeopleNum , ifnull(sum(mpay_recharge_amount), 0) as mpayRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(mpay_recharge_num), 0) as mpayRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(blockchain_recharge_amount), 0) as blockchainRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(blockchain_recharge_num), 0) as blockchainRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(law_withdraw_amount), 0) as lawWithdrawAmount , ifnull(sum(law_withdraw_num), 0) as lawWithdrawNum , MAX(calculations_time) as calculationsTime , ifnull(sum(code_amount), 0) as codeAmount , ifnull(sum(restore_amount), 0) as restoreAmount , ifnull(sum(restore_num), 0) as restoreNum , ifnull(sum(pix_bonus_amount), 0) as pixBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(pixpay_recharge_amount), 0) as pixpayRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(pixpay_recharge_num), 0) as pixpayRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(yndpay_recharge_amount), 0) as yndpayRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(yndpay_recharge_num), 0) as yndpayRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(ynd_bonus_amount), 0) as yndBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(upay_bonus_amount), 0) as upayBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(upay_recharge_amount), 0) as upayRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(upay_recharge_num), 0) as upayRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(pay1818_recharge_amount), 0) as pay1818RechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(pay1818_bonus_amount), 0) as pay1818BonusAmount , ifnull(sum(pay1818_recharge_num), 0) as pay1818RechargeNum , ifnull(sum(rupee_recharge_amount), 0) as rupeeRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(rupee_recharge_num), 0) as rupeeRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(rupee_bonus_amount), 0) as rupeeBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(zloty_recharge_amount), 0) as zlotyRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(zloty_recharge_num), 0) as zlotyRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(zloty_bonus_amount), 0) as zlotyBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(hwpay_recharge_amount), 0) as hwpayRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(hwpay_recharge_num), 0) as hwpayRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(hwpay_bonus_amount), 0) as hwpayBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(u_recharge_amount), 0) as uRechargeAmount , ifnull(sum(u_recharge_num), 0) as uRechargeNum , ifnull(sum(u_bonus_amount), 0) as uBonusAmount , ifnull(sum(new_person_num), 0) as newPersonNum , ifnull(sum(new_person_amount), 0) as newPersonAmount , ifnull(sum(private_person_num), 0) as privatePersonNum , ifnull(sum(private_person_amount), 0) as privatePersonAmount , ifnull(sum(group_num), 0) as groupNum , ifnull(sum(group_amount), 0) as groupAmount , ifnull(sum(super_num), 0) as superNum , ifnull(sum(super_amount), 0) as superAmount , ifnull(sum(red_private_num), 0) as redPrivateNum , ifnull(sum(red_private_amount), 0) as redPrivateAmount , ifnull(sum(red_num), 0) as redNum , ifnull(sum(red_amount), 0) as redAmount , ifnull(sum(vip_reward_num), 0) as vipRewardNum , ifnull(sum(vip_reward_amount), 0) as vipRewardAmount , ifnull(sum(total_packet_amount), 0) as totalPacketAmount from t_count_order where currency_id = #{currencyId} group by left(day_str, 7) having dayStr = #{dayStr}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_count_order
day_str, usdt_balance, currency_id, user_amount, code_amount, settle_amount, win_lose_amount, efficient_bet_amount, wait_rebate_amount, customer_loss_amount, wait_return_commission_amount, calculations_time, user_earnings,
#{dayStr}, #{usdtBalance}, #{currencyId}, #{userAmount}, #{codeAmount}, #{settleAmount}, #{winLoseAmount}, #{efficientBetAmount}, #{waitRebateAmount}, #{customerLossAmount}, #{waitReturnCommissionAmount}, #{calculationsTime}, #{userEarnings},
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
usdt_balance = #{usdtBalance}, user_amount = #{userAmount}, code_amount = code_amount + #{codeAmount}, settle_amount = settle_amount + #{settleAmount}, win_lose_amount = win_lose_amount + #{winLoseAmount}, efficient_bet_amount = efficient_bet_amount + #{efficientBetAmount},
wait_rebate_amount = wait_rebate_amount + #{waitRebateAmount}, customer_loss_amount = customer_loss_amount + #{customerLossAmount},
wait_return_commission_amount = wait_return_commission_amount + #{waitReturnCommissionAmount},
calculations_time = #{calculationsTime}, user_earnings = user_earnings + #{userEarnings},
mapper.update:
update t_count_order set
usdt_balance = #{usdtBalance}, user_amount = #{userAmount}, code_amount = code_amount + #{codeAmount}, settle_amount = settle_amount + #{settleAmount}, win_lose_amount = win_lose_amount + #{winLoseAmount}, efficient_bet_amount = efficient_bet_amount + #{efficientBetAmount},
wait_rebate_amount = wait_rebate_amount + #{waitRebateAmount}, customer_loss_amount = customer_loss_amount + #{customerLossAmount},
wait_return_commission_amount = wait_return_commission_amount + #{waitReturnCommissionAmount},
calculations_time = #{calculationsTime}, user_earnings = user_earnings + #{userEarnings},
where id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_count_order
day_str, usdt_balance, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, recharge_amount, recharge_num, withdraw_amount, withdraw_num, real_amount, fee, user_num, first_num, first_amount, user_amount, second_num, second_amount, three_remain_num, three_remain, seven_remain_num, seven_remain, bet_amount, bet_num, settle_amount, win_lose_amount, efficient_bet_amount, wait_rebate_amount, already_rebate_amount, wait_return_commission_amount, already_return_commission_amount, unclaimed_agent_salary_amount, claimed_agent_salary_amount, play_wheel_term_award, play_wheel_term_num, create_time, update_time, bonus_amount, customer_recharge_amount, customer_bonus_amount, transfer_bonus_amount, customer_recharge_num, customer_real_cash_withdrawal_amount, customer_real_cash_withdrawal_num, customer_real_cash_withdrawal_real_amount, customer_points_deducted_amount, customer_points_deducted_num, activity_award_bonus_amount, receive_bonus_num, activity_award_total_num, receive_turntable_num, user_earnings, user_expenses, customer_loss_amount, calculations_time, recharge_people_num, withdrawal_people_num, active_people_num, mpay_recharge_amount, mpay_recharge_num, blockchain_recharge_amount, blockchain_recharge_num, pixpay_recharge_amount, pixpay_recharge_num, pix_bonus_amount, code_amount,
restore_amount, restore_num,
law_withdraw_num, law_withdraw_amount, ynd_bonus_amount, yndpay_recharge_amount, yndpay_recharge_num, upay_bonus_amount, upay_recharge_amount, upay_recharge_num, pay1818_recharge_amount, pay1818_recharge_num, pay1818_bonus_amount,
rupee_recharge_amount, rupee_recharge_num, rupee_bonus_amount, zloty_recharge_amount, zloty_recharge_num, zloty_bonus_amount, hwpay_recharge_amount, hwpay_recharge_num, hwpay_bonus_amount, u_recharge_amount, u_recharge_num, u_bonus_amount,
new_person_num, new_person_amount, private_person_num, private_person_amount, group_num, group_amount, super_num, super_amount, red_private_num, red_private_amount, red_num, red_amount, vip_reward_num, vip_reward_amount, total_packet_amount,
#{dayStr}, #{usdtBalance}, #{currencyId}, #{itemId}, #{chainTag}, #{rechargeAmount}, #{rechargeNum}, #{withdrawAmount}, #{withdrawNum}, #{realAmount}, #{fee}, #{userNum}, #{firstNum}, #{firstAmount}, #{userAmount}, #{secondNum}, #{secondAmount}, #{threeRemainNum}, ROUND(#{threeRemainNum}/#{threeTotal}*100, 2), #{sevenRemainNum}, ROUND(#{sevenRemainNum}/#{sevenTotal}*100, 2), #{betAmount}, #{betNum}, #{settleAmount}, #{winLoseAmount}, #{efficientBetAmount}, #{waitRebateAmount}, #{alreadyRebateAmount}, #{waitReturnCommissionAmount}, #{alreadyReturnCommissionAmount}, #{unclaimedAgentSalaryAmount}, #{claimedAgentSalaryAmount}, #{playWheelTermAward}, #{playWheelTermNum}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{bonusAmount}, #{customerRechargeAmount}, #{customerBonusAmount}, #{transferBonusAmount}, #{customerRechargeNum}, #{customerRealCashWithdrawalAmount}, #{customerRealCashWithdrawalNum}, #{customerRealCashWithdrawalRealAmount}, #{customerPointsDeductedAmount}, #{customerPointsDeductedNum}, #{activityAwardBonusAmount}, #{receiveBonusNum}, #{activityAwardTotalNum}, #{receiveTurntableNum}, #{userEarnings}, #{userExpenses}, #{customerLossAmount}, #{calculationsTime}, #{rechargePeopleNum}, #{withdrawalPeopleNum}, #{activePeopleNum}, #{mpayRechargeAmount}, #{mpayRechargeNum}, #{blockchainRechargeAmount}, #{blockchainRechargeNum}, #{pixpayRechargeAmount}, #{pixpayRechargeNum}, #{pixBonusAmount}, #{codeAmount},
#{restoreAmount}, #{restoreNum},
#{lawWithdrawNum}, #{lawWithdrawAmount}, #{yndBonusAmount}, #{yndpayRechargeAmount}, #{yndpayRechargeNum}, #{upayBonusAmount}, #{upayRechargeAmount}, #{upayRechargeNum}, #{pay1818RechargeAmount}, #{pay1818RechargeNum}, #{pay1818BonusAmount},
#{rupeeRechargeAmount}, #{rupeeRechargeNum}, #{rupeeBonusAmount}, #{zlotyRechargeAmount}, #{zlotyRechargeNum}, #{zlotyBonusAmount}, #{hwpayRechargeAmount}, #{hwpayRechargeNum}, #{hwpayBonusAmount}, #{uRechargeAmount}, #{uRechargeNum}, #{uBonusAmount},
#{newPersonNum}, #{newPersonAmount}, #{privatePersonNum}, #{privatePersonAmount}, #{groupNum}, #{groupAmount}, #{superNum}, #{superAmount}, #{redPrivateNum}, #{redPrivateAmount}, #{redNum}, #{redAmount}, #{vipRewardNum}, #{vipRewardAmount}, #{totalPacketAmount},
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
usdt_balance = #{usdtBalance}, recharge_amount = recharge_amount + #{rechargeAmount}, recharge_num = recharge_num + #{rechargeNum}, withdraw_amount = withdraw_amount + #{withdrawAmount}, withdraw_num = withdraw_num + #{withdrawNum}, real_amount = real_amount + #{realAmount}, fee = fee + #{fee}, user_num = user_num + #{userNum}, bet_amount = bet_amount + #{betAmount}, bet_num = bet_num + #{betNum}, settle_amount = settle_amount + #{settleAmount}, win_lose_amount = win_lose_amount + #{winLoseAmount}, efficient_bet_amount = efficient_bet_amount + #{efficientBetAmount},
wait_rebate_amount = wait_rebate_amount + #{waitRebateAmount}, already_rebate_amount = already_rebate_amount + #{alreadyRebateAmount},
wait_return_commission_amount = wait_return_commission_amount + #{waitReturnCommissionAmount},
already_return_commission_amount = already_return_commission_amount + #{alreadyReturnCommissionAmount},
unclaimed_agent_salary_amount = unclaimed_agent_salary_amount + #{unclaimedAgentSalaryAmount},
claimed_agent_salary_amount = claimed_agent_salary_amount + #{claimedAgentSalaryAmount},
play_wheel_term_award = play_wheel_term_award + #{playWheelTermAward},
play_wheel_term_num = play_wheel_term_num + #{playWheelTermNum}, bonus_amount = bonus_amount + #{bonusAmount}, customer_recharge_amount = customer_recharge_amount + #{customerRechargeAmount},
customer_bonus_amount = customer_bonus_amount + #{customerBonusAmount},
transfer_bonus_amount = transfer_bonus_amount + #{transferBonusAmount},
customer_recharge_num = customer_recharge_num + #{customerRechargeNum},
customer_real_cash_withdrawal_amount = customer_real_cash_withdrawal_amount + #{customerRealCashWithdrawalAmount},
customer_real_cash_withdrawal_num = customer_real_cash_withdrawal_num + #{customerRealCashWithdrawalNum},
customer_real_cash_withdrawal_real_amount = customer_real_cash_withdrawal_real_amount + #{customerRealCashWithdrawalRealAmount},
customer_points_deducted_amount = customer_points_deducted_amount + #{customerPointsDeductedAmount},
customer_points_deducted_num = customer_points_deducted_num + #{customerPointsDeductedNum},
activity_award_bonus_amount = activity_award_bonus_amount + #{activityAwardBonusAmount},
receive_bonus_num = receive_bonus_num + #{receiveBonusNum}, activity_award_total_num = activity_award_total_num + #{activityAwardTotalNum},
receive_turntable_num = receive_turntable_num + #{receiveTurntableNum},
user_earnings = user_earnings + #{userEarnings}, user_expenses = user_expenses + #{userExpenses}, customer_loss_amount = customer_loss_amount + #{customerLossAmount},
mpay_recharge_amount = mpay_recharge_amount + #{mpayRechargeAmount},
mpay_recharge_num = mpay_recharge_num + #{mpayRechargeNum}, blockchain_recharge_amount = blockchain_recharge_amount + #{blockchainRechargeAmount},
blockchain_recharge_num = blockchain_recharge_num + #{blockchainRechargeNum},
pixpay_recharge_amount = pixpay_recharge_amount+ #{pixpayRechargeAmount},
pixpay_recharge_num = pixpay_recharge_num + #{pixpayRechargeNum}, pix_bonus_amount = pix_bonus_amount + #{pixBonusAmount}, code_amount = code_amount + #{codeAmount},
first_num = #{firstNum}, first_amount = #{firstAmount}, user_amount = #{userAmount}, second_num = #{secondNum}, second_amount = #{secondAmount}, three_remain_num =three_remain_num+ #{threeRemainNum}, three_remain =ROUND((three_remain_num)/#{threeTotal}*100, 2), seven_remain_num =seven_remain_num+ #{sevenRemainNum}, seven_remain =ROUND((seven_remain_num)/#{sevenTotal}*100, 2), update_time = #{updateTime}, calculations_time = #{calculationsTime}, recharge_people_num = #{rechargePeopleNum}, withdrawal_people_num = #{withdrawalPeopleNum}, active_people_num = #{activePeopleNum},
restore_amount = #{restoreAmount}, restore_num = #{restoreNum},
law_withdraw_num = law_withdraw_num + #{lawWithdrawNum}, law_withdraw_amount = law_withdraw_amount + #{lawWithdrawAmount}, ynd_bonus_amount= ynd_bonus_amount + #{yndBonusAmount}, yndpay_recharge_amount= yndpay_recharge_amount + #{yndpayRechargeAmount},
yndpay_recharge_num= yndpay_recharge_num + #{yndpayRechargeNum}, upay_bonus_amount= upay_bonus_amount + #{upayBonusAmount}, upay_recharge_amount= upay_recharge_amount + #{upayRechargeAmount},
upay_recharge_num= upay_recharge_num + #{upayRechargeNum}, pay1818_recharge_amount = pay1818_recharge_amount+ #{pay1818RechargeAmount},
pay1818_recharge_num = pay1818_recharge_num + #{pay1818RechargeNum},
pay1818_bonus_amount = pay1818_bonus_amount + #{pay1818BonusAmount},
rupee_recharge_amount = rupee_recharge_amount + #{rupeeRechargeAmount},
rupee_recharge_num = rupee_recharge_num + #{rupeeRechargeNum}, rupee_bonus_amount = rupee_bonus_amount + #{rupeeBonusAmount}, zloty_recharge_amount = zloty_recharge_amount + #{zlotyRechargeAmount},
zloty_recharge_num = zloty_recharge_num + #{zlotyRechargeNum}, zloty_bonus_amount = zloty_bonus_amount + #{zlotyBonusAmount}, hwpay_recharge_amount = hwpay_recharge_amount + #{hwpayRechargeAmount},
hwpay_recharge_num = hwpay_recharge_num + #{hwpayRechargeNum}, hwpay_bonus_amount = hwpay_bonus_amount + #{hwpayBonusAmount}, u_recharge_amount = u_recharge_amount + #{uRechargeAmount}, u_recharge_num = u_recharge_num + #{uRechargeNum}, u_bonus_amount = u_bonus_amount + #{uBonusAmount},
new_person_num = new_person_num + #{newPersonNum}, new_person_amount = new_person_amount+#{newPersonAmount}, private_person_num = private_person_num + #{privatePersonNum}, private_person_amount = private_person_amount + #{privatePersonAmount},
group_num = group_num + #{groupNum}, group_amount = group_amount + #{groupAmount}, super_num =super_num + #{superNum}, super_amount = super_amount +#{superAmount}, red_private_num = red_private_num + #{redPrivateNum}, red_private_amount = red_private_amount + #{redPrivateAmount}, red_num = red_num +#{redNum}, red_amount = red_amount +#{redAmount}, vip_reward_num = vip_reward_num +#{vipRewardNum}, vip_reward_amount = vip_reward_amount +#{vipRewardAmount},
total_packet_amount = total_packet_amount + #{totalPacketAmount},
mapper.update:
update t_count_order
usdt_balance = #{usdtBalance}, recharge_amount = recharge_amount + #{rechargeAmount}, recharge_num = recharge_num + #{rechargeNum}, withdraw_amount = withdraw_amount + #{withdrawAmount}, withdraw_num = withdraw_num + #{withdrawNum}, real_amount = real_amount + #{realAmount}, fee = fee + #{fee}, user_num = user_num + #{userNum}, bet_amount = bet_amount + #{betAmount}, bet_num = bet_num + #{betNum}, settle_amount = settle_amount + #{settleAmount}, win_lose_amount = win_lose_amount + #{winLoseAmount}, efficient_bet_amount = efficient_bet_amount + #{efficientBetAmount},
wait_rebate_amount = wait_rebate_amount + #{waitRebateAmount}, already_rebate_amount = already_rebate_amount + #{alreadyRebateAmount},
wait_return_commission_amount = wait_return_commission_amount + #{waitReturnCommissionAmount},
already_return_commission_amount = already_return_commission_amount + #{alreadyReturnCommissionAmount},
unclaimed_agent_salary_amount = unclaimed_agent_salary_amount + #{unclaimedAgentSalaryAmount},
claimed_agent_salary_amount = claimed_agent_salary_amount + #{claimedAgentSalaryAmount},
play_wheel_term_award = play_wheel_term_award + #{playWheelTermAward},
play_wheel_term_num = play_wheel_term_num + #{playWheelTermNum}, bonus_amount = bonus_amount + #{bonusAmount}, customer_recharge_amount = customer_recharge_amount + #{customerRechargeAmount},
customer_bonus_amount = customer_bonus_amount + #{customerBonusAmount},
transfer_bonus_amount = transfer_bonus_amount + #{transferBonusAmount},
customer_recharge_num = customer_recharge_num + #{customerRechargeNum},
customer_real_cash_withdrawal_amount = customer_real_cash_withdrawal_amount + #{customerRealCashWithdrawalAmount},
customer_real_cash_withdrawal_num = customer_real_cash_withdrawal_num + #{customerRealCashWithdrawalNum},
customer_real_cash_withdrawal_real_amount = customer_real_cash_withdrawal_real_amount + #{customerRealCashWithdrawalRealAmount},
customer_points_deducted_amount = customer_points_deducted_amount + #{customerPointsDeductedAmount},
customer_points_deducted_num = customer_points_deducted_num + #{customerPointsDeductedNum},
activity_award_bonus_amount = activity_award_bonus_amount + #{activityAwardBonusAmount},
receive_bonus_num = receive_bonus_num + #{receiveBonusNum}, activity_award_total_num = activity_award_total_num + #{activityAwardTotalNum},
receive_turntable_num = receive_turntable_num + #{receiveTurntableNum},
user_earnings = user_earnings + #{userEarnings}, user_expenses = user_expenses + #{userExpenses}, customer_loss_amount = customer_loss_amount + #{customerLossAmount},
mpay_recharge_amount = mpay_recharge_amount + #{mpayRechargeAmount},
mpay_recharge_num = mpay_recharge_num + #{mpayRechargeNum}, blockchain_recharge_amount = blockchain_recharge_amount + #{blockchainRechargeAmount},
blockchain_recharge_num = blockchain_recharge_num + #{blockchainRechargeNum},
pixpay_recharge_amount = pixpay_recharge_amount+ #{pixpayRechargeAmount},
pixpay_recharge_num = pixpay_recharge_num + #{pixpayRechargeNum}, pix_bonus_amount = pix_bonus_amount + #{pixBonusAmount}, code_amount = code_amount + #{codeAmount},
first_num = #{firstNum}, first_amount = #{firstAmount}, user_amount = #{userAmount}, second_num = #{secondNum}, second_amount = #{secondAmount}, three_remain_num =three_remain_num+ #{threeRemainNum}, three_remain =ROUND((three_remain_num)/#{threeTotal}*100, 2), seven_remain_num =seven_remain_num+ #{sevenRemainNum}, seven_remain =ROUND((seven_remain_num)/#{sevenTotal}*100, 2), update_time = #{updateTime}, calculations_time = #{calculationsTime}, recharge_people_num = #{rechargePeopleNum}, withdrawal_people_num = #{withdrawalPeopleNum}, active_people_num = #{activePeopleNum},
restore_amount = #{restoreAmount}, restore_num = #{restoreNum},
law_withdraw_num = law_withdraw_num + #{lawWithdrawNum}, law_withdraw_amount = law_withdraw_amount + #{lawWithdrawAmount}, ynd_bonus_amount= ynd_bonus_amount + #{yndBonusAmount}, yndpay_recharge_amount= yndpay_recharge_amount + #{yndpayRechargeAmount},
yndpay_recharge_num= yndpay_recharge_num + #{yndpayRechargeNum}, upay_bonus_amount= upay_bonus_amount + #{upayBonusAmount}, upay_recharge_amount= upay_recharge_amount + #{upayRechargeAmount},
upay_recharge_num= upay_recharge_num + #{upayRechargeNum}, pay1818_recharge_amount = pay1818_recharge_amount+ #{pay1818RechargeAmount},
pay1818_recharge_num = pay1818_recharge_num + #{pay1818RechargeNum},
pay1818_bonus_amount = pay1818_bonus_amount + #{pay1818BonusAmount},
rupee_recharge_amount = rupee_recharge_amount + #{rupeeRechargeAmount},
rupee_recharge_num = rupee_recharge_num + #{rupeeRechargeNum}, rupee_bonus_amount = rupee_bonus_amount + #{rupeeBonusAmount}, zloty_recharge_amount = zloty_recharge_amount + #{zlotyRechargeAmount},
zloty_recharge_num = zloty_recharge_num + #{zlotyRechargeNum}, zloty_bonus_amount = zloty_bonus_amount + #{zlotyBonusAmount}, hwpay_recharge_amount = hwpay_recharge_amount + #{hwpayRechargeAmount},
hwpay_recharge_num = hwpay_recharge_num + #{hwpayRechargeNum}, hwpay_bonus_amount = hwpay_bonus_amount + #{hwpayBonusAmount}, u_recharge_amount = u_recharge_amount + #{uRechargeAmount}, u_recharge_num = u_recharge_num + #{uRechargeNum}, u_bonus_amount = u_bonus_amount + #{uBonusAmount}, new_person_num = new_person_num + #{newPersonNum}, new_person_amount = new_person_amount+#{newPersonAmount}, private_person_num = private_person_num + #{privatePersonNum}, private_person_amount = private_person_amount + #{privatePersonAmount},
group_num = group_num + #{groupNum}, group_amount = group_amount + #{groupAmount}, super_num =super_num + #{superNum}, super_amount = super_amount +#{superAmount}, red_private_num = red_private_num + #{redPrivateNum}, red_private_amount = red_private_amount + #{redPrivateAmount}, red_num = red_num +#{redNum}, red_amount = red_amount +#{redAmount}, vip_reward_num = vip_reward_num +#{vipRewardNum}, vip_reward_amount = vip_reward_amount +#{vipRewardAmount},
total_packet_amount = total_packet_amount + #{totalPacketAmount},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(bet_amount), 0.0000) as betAmount , ifnull(sum(unsettled_bets_amount), 0.0000) as unsettleAmount , ifnull(sum(code_amount), 0.0000) as codeAmount , ifnull(sum(settle_amount), 0.0000) as win , ifnull(sum(win_lose_amount), 0.0000) as winLoss from t_count_order

SELECT wait_rebate_amount as waitRebateAmount, wait_return_commission_amount as waitReturnCommissionAmount, unclaimed_agent_salary_amount as unclaimedAgentSalaryAmount, claimed_agent_salary_amount as claimedAgentSalaryAmount FROM t_count_order WHERE 1=1
and day_str = #{dayStr}

SELECT ifnull(sum(wait_rebate_amount), 0.0000) as waitRebateAmount, ifnull(sum(wait_return_commission_amount), 0.0000) as waitReturnCommissionAmount, ifnull(sum(unclaimed_agent_salary_amount), 0.0000) as unclaimedAgentSalaryAmount, ifnull(sum(claimed_agent_salary_amount), 0.0000) as claimedAgentSalaryAmount FROM t_count_order WHERE 1=1
and day_str = #{dayStr}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_count_order (day_str, currency_id, code_amount, settle_amount, win_lose_amount, efficient_bet_amount, customer_loss_amount, calculations_time, user_amount) VALUES (#{dayStr}, #{currencyId}, #{codeAmount}, #{settleAmount}, #{winLoseAmount}, #{efficientBetAmount}, #{customerLossAmount}, #{calculationsTime}, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE code_amount = code_amount + VALUES(code_amount) , settle_amount = settle_amount + VALUES(settle_amount) , win_lose_amount = win_lose_amount + VALUES(win_lose_amount) , efficient_bet_amount = efficient_bet_amount + VALUES(efficient_bet_amount) , customer_loss_amount = customer_loss_amount + VALUES(customer_loss_amount) , calculations_time = VALUES(calculations_time)
, user_earnings = user_earnings + #{userEarnings}
